stencils.description: Creative or professional-services agency site. Strong brand identity, services showcase, portfolio of work, team profiles, and lead-capture forms.

supportedContent.notes: Core offering pages — services, about, contact.
Work samples, photo galleries, process shots.

stencils.description: Content-first personal or editorial blog. Long-form articles with full taxonomy support (categories, tags), author profiles, related content, and an RSS-friendly sitemap.

supportedContent.notes: Long-form posts are the primary content unit.
Short-form blog entries and news posts.

stencils.description: High-volume editorial or news magazine. Multiple content sections, editorial curation, mega-menu navigation, gallery support, and category-driven discovery. Scales to thousands of articles.

supportedContent.notes: News stories, features, and opinion pieces.

supportedPageTypes.notes: Editorial front page with curated sections.

stencils.description: Creative professional or design studio portfolio. Work-first layout with project case studies, photo/video galleries, and a clean personal brand presence. Minimal chrome to let the work speak.

supportedContent.notes: Project case studies and work samples.

stencils.description: Technical documentation or knowledge base. Persistent sidebar navigation, step-by-step guides, full-text search, table of contents, code blocks, and version-aware breadcrumbs. Built for developer or user references.

supportedContent.notes: API references, SDK guides, and conceptual docs.
Blog posts, release notes, and announcements.

stencils.description: Product or service marketplace. Filter-bar faceted browsing, category mega-menu, listing grids, detail pages, and conversion-oriented CTAs. Supports digital goods, services, or physical products.

supportedContent.notes: Homepage, campaign, and vendor landing pages.

stencils.description: Business, venue, or resource directory. Category-tree browsing, filter-bar facets, listing detail pages, and SEO-friendly category archives. Suitable for local business guides, tool directories, vendor lists, and resource hubs.

supportedContent.notes: Homepage, city or region landing pages.

stencils.description: Personal event or wedding website. Visual-first with a full-bleed hero, large image galleries, event schedule, venue information, and FAQ. Minimal navigation, strong typography, and a single-occasion focus.

supportedContent.notes: Event details — couple story, venue, schedule.
Guest FAQ — dress code, travel, accommodation.

supportedPageTypes.notes: Full-bleed hero, couple story, key info.
